rows.label: tlk47100012_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Lately, a lot of unfamiliar faces
have been coming around.

rows.label: tlk47100012_03_msg0002
rows.name: Word is they fled from somewhere—

rows.label: tlk47100012_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I actually like this place
quite a bit, you know.

rows.label: tlk47100012_03_msg0004
rows.name:
I don't want things to get so bad
we have to flee this place—
